workflow_rationale: This is a multi-component feature that adds SMS notification capability to an existing order system. It follows the feature workflow pattern: database setup → service implementation → UI integration → notifications → admin tools → verification.

phases.name: Database Schema Updates
phases.description: Add SMS opt-in fields to database models and create SmsNotification tracking table

subtasks.description: Add smsOptIn field to UserProfile and Order models, create SmsNotification model

verification.command: npx prisma format && npx prisma validate

subtasks.notes: SmsNotification should track: id, orderNumber, phone, message, status, cost, sentAt, deliveredAt, errorMessage

subtasks.description: Generate and apply Prisma migration for SMS fields

verification.command: npx prisma migrate dev --name add_sms_notifications --create-only && echo 'Migration created'

subtasks.notes: Don't apply migration yet - just create it. Application will happen in integration phase.

phases.name: SMS Service Implementation
phases.description: Create SMS service with Twilio integration, error handling, and cost tracking

subtasks.description: Install Twilio SDK and create SMS service with sendSMS function
subtasks.notes: Create sendSMS(to, message, orderNumber?) function that logs to SmsNotification table. Include error handling and fallback logic.

subtasks.description: Create Twilio webhook endpoint for delivery status and STOP command handling

verification.instructions: Review webhook route code for proper signature validation and database updates

subtasks.notes: Handle MessageStatus events to update SmsNotification.status and SmsNotification.deliveredAt. Handle STOP to update UserProfile.smsOptIn = false.

phases.name: Checkout SMS Opt-in
phases.description: Add SMS opt-in checkbox to checkout form with TCPA-compliant disclosure

subtasks.description: Update checkout schema to include smsOptIn field
subtasks.notes: Add smsOptIn: z.boolean().default(false) to checkoutFormSchema and checkoutSchema

subtasks.description: Add SMS opt-in checkbox to checkout form component
subtasks.notes: Add checkbox after email field with label: 'Send me SMS updates for this order' and disclosure: 'By checking this box, you consent to receive automated text messages about your order. Message and data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out.'

subtasks.description: Update checkout API to save smsOptIn to Order record

verification.instructions: Test checkout with SMS opt-in checked, verify Order.smsOptIn is saved in database

subtasks.notes: Add smsOptIn field to order creation (line 49-65 area)

phases.name: Profile SMS Preferences
phases.description: Add SMS notification preferences to user profile settings

subtasks.description: Update profile schema to include smsOptIn field
subtasks.notes: Add smsOptIn: z.boolean().optional() to profileSchema and profileUpdateSchema

subtasks.description: Add SMS preferences toggle to profile page
subtasks.notes: Add toggle after company field with same TCPA disclosure as checkout

subtasks.description: Update profile API to save smsOptIn preference
subtasks.notes: Handle smsOptIn in both GET and PUT handlers

phases.name: Order Status Notifications
phases.description: Send SMS notifications when order status changes (confirmed, out for delivery, delivered)

subtasks.description: Update Stripe webhook to send SMS on order confirmation

verification.instructions: Trigger test Stripe webhook, verify SMS is sent if order has smsOptIn=true and phone number, verify SmsNotification record is created

subtasks.notes: In checkout.session.completed handler, check if order.smsOptIn is true and order.phone exists, then call sendSMS with confirmation message

subtasks.description: Create helper function for order status SMS messages
subtasks.notes: Create getOrderStatusMessage(status, orderNumber, trackingUrl?) that returns SMS text templates for each status: confirmed, out-for-delivery, delivered

subtasks.description: Add SMS fallback logic - send email if SMS fails

verification.instructions: Review code for try-catch around sendSMS with email fallback, verify error logging

subtasks.notes: If sendSMS throws error, log to SmsNotification with status='failed', then send email notification as fallback

phases.name: Admin SMS Cost Tracking
phases.description: Create admin endpoint to view SMS costs and usage statistics

subtasks.description: Create admin API endpoint for SMS cost reporting
subtasks.notes: Query SmsNotification table, aggregate by date/month, sum costs, return JSON with total cost, message count, delivery rate. Add basic auth check (Clerk admin role or env var check)

phases.name: Integration & Testing
phases.description: End-to-end verification of SMS notification flow

subtasks.description: Apply database migration to development database

verification.command: npx prisma migrate deploy && npx prisma generate

subtasks.notes: Migration script created (apply-migration.sh). Ready to run from main project directory. Database unreachable from worktree as expected.

subtasks.description: End-to-end test: Checkout with SMS opt-in → Payment → SMS sent

steps: Complete checkout form with SMS opt-in checked and valid phone number
Verify order status updated to 'confirmed' in database
Verify SmsNotification record created with status='sent' or 'delivered'
Verify SMS received at phone number (use Twilio test credentials)
Verify SMS message contains order number and status link

subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive E2E test scripts (bash and Node.js) with full documentation. Tests cover complete flow from checkout to SMS delivery. Uses Twilio test number +15005550006 to avoid SMS charges.

subtasks.description: Test SMS opt-out via STOP command

steps: Send STOP message to Twilio number
Verify UserProfile.smsOptIn set to false for that phone number
Create new order with same phone - verify no SMS sent

subtasks.notes: TCPA compliance requires immediate opt-out handling

subtasks.description: Verify SMS cost tracking in admin dashboard
subtasks.notes: Verify response includes totalCost, messageCount, and deliveryRate fields

parallel_groups.reason: All three depend only on phase-1-database and work on different file sets

parallelism.speedup_estimate: 1.4x faster than sequential (phases 2-4 can run in parallel)

acceptance_criteria: SMS notifications send successfully for order confirmation
SMS opt-in/opt-out works in checkout and profile
STOP command handling works for TCPA compliance
SMS costs are tracked and reportable
Fallback to email works when SMS fails
No secrets (Twilio credentials) exposed in code

verification_steps.name: E2E Order Flow
verification_steps.expected_outcome: End-to-end order with SMS completes successfully

verification_strategy.reasoning: High risk due to: (1) Third-party API integration with cost implications, (2) TCPA compliance requirements, (3) Customer PII (phone numbers), (4) Payment flow modification. Requires thorough testing and security review.

checks: Environment variables used for API keys
Phone numbers stored securely (not in logs)

recoveryNote: Task recovered from stuck state at 2026-04-23T20:32:22.787Z
